description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is already loaded in InVesalius 3. An oral surgeon needs a standalone 3D model of the patient's mandible (lower jaw) for implant planning, without the obstruction of the maxilla or skull base. Segment and isolate the mandible from the rest of the skull and export the isolated mandible surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/mandible.stl.
